headline: Allegro MicroSystems, Lam Research, and Applied Materials Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after President Trump announced Apple had agreed to design and manufacture chips with Intel in the United States, a foundry validation the market had been waiting on for over a year.

headline: Stocks Rally as President Trump Signs a Preliminary Deal to End the US-Iran War

headline: Renaissance Investment Management Expects Positive Upward Revision for Lam Research (LRCX)
summary: Renaissance Investment Management, an investment management company, released its Q1 2026 “Large Cap Growth Strategy.” A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Stocks fell sharply in the first quarter due to the Iran conflict. The Energy and Materials sectors outperformed, Financials and Consumer Discretionary lagged. Large-cap stocks underperformed smaller-cap stocks, and Value outperformed Growth. […]

headline: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX)’s WFE Opportunity May Be Bigger Than Expected
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is among the stocks with the best earnings growth for the next 3 years. On June 15, Oppenheimer elevated the price target on Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) to $400 from $330 and reaffirmed an Outperform rating. According to the firm, the Lam bus tour strengthened confidence that AI-related WFE growth potential […]

headline: Warsh's Hawkish Debut Resets the Rate Curve and Oil Cracks as Iran Deal Lands
summary: Kevin Warsh's hawkish Fed debut lifted the dot plot and fully priced an October rate hike, sending the 10-year to 4.49% and the Dow down 1%.

headline: Lam Research (LRCX) Receives a Price Target Boost at Barclays. Here is Why
summary: With a net profit margin of 30.94%, Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is included among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026. Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) designs, manufactures, markets, refurbishes, and services semiconductor processing equipment used in the fabrication of integrated circuits in the United States, China, Korea, Taiwan, Japan, Southeast Asia, and Europe. […]
